items.title: Two trains collide in Denmark, leaving several critically injured
items.summary: A police statement called it “a serious accident”, but a police spokesman told AFP that all passengers had been evacuated from the trains.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Candidates vying for U.N. secretary-general role face questions
items.summary: Who will replace U.N. Secretary-General Antonio Guterres when he steps down this year? Four candidates field questions from member states this week at U.N. headquarters.
